src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security configuration from the deprecated fluent API to the new lambda-based DSL required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.why_exists: The methods `authorizeRequests()`, `antMatchers()`, and the old `formLogin()`/`logout()` chaining syntax are removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Album.j.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Album.j.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, or compile errors if the old API jar is not present.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/CommonAp.general_idea: Replace deprecated Apache HttpClient 4.x imports with Apache HttpClient 5.x equivalents to support Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/CommonAp.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 9+ and drops support for Apache HttpClient 4.x; using old imports causes compile errors due to missing classes or dependency conflicts.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/HttpClie.general_idea: Update import statement for BasicCookieStore to use the new Apache HttpClient 5 package structure.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/HttpClie.why_exists: The class org.apache.http.impl.client.BasicCookieStore does not exist in Apache HttpClient 5, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/HttpClie.why_exists: The class org.apache.http.impl.client.CloseableHttpClient does not exist in Apache HttpClient 5, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/HttpDele.why_exists: The class org.apache.http.client.methods.HttpEntityEnclosingRequestBase does not exist in Apache HttpClient 5, causing a compilation error.
